reason: Single project-level named character board will be generated directly in the parent thread for immediate visual supervision and QC; no background Codex thread is required.

jobs.thread_title: 断航故土 青翎鸦见多状态角色板 v01
jobs.history_policy: If future iterations supersede the canonical file, move retained intermediates into project/severed-homeland/assets/characters/history/ with a .vNNN filename suffix.
retry_rules: Retry if the board creates a new Qingling emblem, crow crest, blue feather logo, large Wanshou badge, wall emblem, shield emblem, or banner logo.
Retry if the three states do not preserve the same named character identity.
Retry if left teal feather cluster, right-eye scar, corvid face, feather arm cape, bone hook, rope spool, message tube, three right-forearm bone rings, or dark blood oath cord are missing.
Retry if the model becomes Luming-style noble shaman, generic Snowfeather troop, Grey Wall human soldier, Suming insect infantry, Yingzhou crane-clan warrior, modern ninja, or human ranger.
Retry if any pose reads as heroic flight or high-magic wings instead of wall-climbing, rope work, or covert scouting.
Retry if visible text, labels, UI, or watermark appear.
